rates_data_backfill.effort: LOW — run databento_loader.py for ZN/ZF/ZB backfill to 2019
rates_data_backfill.worth_it: YES — highest ROI data spend. Unlocks rates EVENT + CARRY ideas. Two high-value candidates share this blocker.

fx_rate_data_feed.cost: FREE — simple hardcoded rate lookup table updated quarterly
fx_rate_data_feed.effort: LOW — 30 min to build rate table + filter logic
fx_rate_data_feed.worth_it: YES — carry filter already proven useful on 6J (PF improvement). No external feed needed.
fx_rate_data_feed.timing: After probation review, when carry filter is implemented

macro_data_feeds.cost: UNKNOWN — OECD PPP, CPI feeds, yield curve data
macro_data_feeds.effort: HIGH — new data source integration, ongoing maintenance
macro_data_feeds.worth_it: NO (not yet) — these are sophisticated macro strategies that need proven simpler versions first
macro_data_feeds.timing: Phase 3+ (after basic carry and rates strategies are proven)

auction_imbalance_data.cost: UNKNOWN — Level 2 or MOC imbalance feed
auction_imbalance_data.effort: HIGH — new data source, different data type from OHLCV
auction_imbalance_data.worth_it: NO (not yet) — single strategy unlocked, exotic data requirement
auction_imbalance_data.timing: Defer indefinitely unless closing-auction research becomes a priority

high_resolution_execution.effort: HIGH — new data granularity, engine changes
high_resolution_execution.worth_it: NO — simpler EIA reaction already tested and rejected (PF 0.93). Sub-minute version unlikely to change the outcome materially.

spread_trading_infrastructure.effort: HIGH — needs front/back month separate data, roll calendar, spread P&L logic
spread_trading_infrastructure.worth_it: MAYBE later — spread trading is genuinely different from outright, but infrastructure cost is high for 2 ideas
spread_trading_infrastructure.timing: Phase 3+ if rates/energy outright strategies are proven first

curve_hedge_support.cost: ZN vs ZB (or ZF vs ZN) spread logic
curve_hedge_support.effort: MEDIUM — similar to spread trading but simpler (two known instruments)
curve_hedge_support.worth_it: MAYBE — genuinely different factor (relative value), but only 1 idea unlocked. Better to wait until spread infrastructure exists.
curve_hedge_support.timing: After spread trading infrastructure if built

mechanical_definition_work.cost: FREE — just needs clearer rule extraction
mechanical_definition_work.effort: LOW-MEDIUM — read the source material more carefully, define mechanical rules
mechanical_definition_work.worth_it: MAYBE — NFP-Price-Zones may overlap with NFP-Level-Breakout (already in probation). FOMC-Sweep is interesting but ICT-adjacent.
mechanical_definition_work.timing: Only if the specific EVENT sub-family needs more candidates

futures_native_validation.cost: FREE — just needs testing on MGC futures data
futures_native_validation.effort: LOW — already tested Equity-Overnight-Drift, could adapt for gold
futures_native_validation.worth_it: MAYBE — equity overnight was MONITOR (PF 1.09). Gold overnight might be different but likely same structural weakness.
futures_native_validation.timing: Low priority unless gold overnight shows different characteristics than equity

highest_roi_unlock.why_highest: Cheapest spend, unlocks 2 high-value EVENT+CARRY ideas on the #1 missing asset class (rates)

second_roi_unlock.timing: At probation promotion (carry filter already proven useful)
second_roi_unlock.why_second: Zero cost, already proven to improve PF on 6J strategies

defer: Macro data feeds (OECD PPP, CPI) — too complex for current phase
Auction imbalance data — exotic, single strategy
Tick data / sub-minute engine — EIA already failed on 5m
Spread trading infrastructure — high effort, 2 ideas only
